body.thing: InstancePool refuses to allocate beyond max_instances (singleton = 1)
body.intention: with max_instances=1, the first allocate returns 0 and the second returns None (refused) — an uncapped build returns 1

red_run.summary:
pool = InstancePool(
            "T",
            max_instances=1,
            liveness=lambda *a: True,
            home=str(tmp_path),
        )
    
        # First allocate should succeed at slot 0
        result_0 = pool.allocate(pid=1)
        assert result_0 == 0
    
        # Second allocate should be refused (return None)
        result_1 = pool.allocate(pid=2)
>       assert result_1 is None
E       assert 1 is None
